ordinanceLabel: Alameda Municipal Code · Municode · Article XIII (Building and Housing) · Ord. 2022-2666
fireAgency: Alameda Fire Department — Fire Prevention Bureau · City of Alameda (not County Fire) · Plan check via CSG Consultants (contracted) · ~2-week turnaround · (510) 747-7460
utility: Alameda Municipal Power (AMP) — city-owned electric utility, NOT PG&E · (510) 748-3900 · alamedamp.com
